changelog: Overlay buttons no longer toggle play/pause; Jellyfin's Next Up is suppressed while tuned; watch state is now fully untouched (progress reverts continuously); skipping ahead advances to the next program; earlier end-of-episode overlay; pause panel with channel info and options (integrates with Jellyfin Enhanced's pause screen); channel suggestions from the library in the settings; polished visuals; plugin icon.
description: Lightweight virtual TV channels: deterministic schedules over your own library, tuned in via normal direct playback at the live position. No transcoding, no tuner emulation.
name: LiteTV Channels
overview: TV channels from your library, without transcoding.
